Resolves #14540

Consumer-sweep leaf of #14472 (concept-id SSOT) â€” the follow-up I spun out of my own #14528 review, where I grepped every `(CONCEPT|CLASS|PROCESS):` site in `ai/` and found two deterministic consumers still minting/keying concept refs on divergent forms. The canonicalization pass is only as complete as its consumer sweep.

## What it does
- **`AdrIngestor.parseEdges`** â€” `CODIFIES_CONCEPT` edges keyed the **raw** captured ref (`GoldenPath`), so ADRâ†’concept edges pointed at a *different* node than the session/mailbox mints (`golden-path`), splitting the ADRâ†’concept graph axis even after the #14502 merge executor tombstones the alias clusters. Now routes `match[1]` through `canonicalizeConceptId` (import-and-delegate â€” the #14528 pattern), with a **raw-ref fallback** (`|| match[1]`) so an empty canonicalization never drops the edge (Contract Ledger fallback).
- **`ConceptDiscoveryService.normalizeConceptNameForDedupe`** â€” an **intentional-divergence docblock**, decided from the code (not delegation). V-B-A: it strips a leading `The ` and drops separators (dash-less) â€” a looser fold than the SSOT; **delegating would SPLIT the `"The X"`/`"X"` candidate group**. It keys internal mining candidates only (never a graph id), so per the one-vocabulary-per-contract invariant it is documented divergence-by-purpose, not a re-derived copy of the graph vocabulary.

## Deltas from ticket
- Chose the **docblock** for `ConceptDiscoveryService` (not delegation) â€” the ticket said "decide in-PR from the code evidence," and the evidence (the `The `-strip + dash-less fold) shows delegating would change candidate-dedupe grouping. The intentional-divergence docblock is the honest disposition.
- The #14528 review nits (AC4) are optional ("fold IF not already landed"); deferred to keep this leaf's diff focused on the consumer sweep â€” they touch `MailboxService`, a different surface.

## Test Evidence
Evidence: L2 (unit â€” **24 ingestion specs green**, incl. a new AC1 test: `CONCEPT:GoldenPath` â†’ `CODIFIES_CONCEPT` edge target `golden-path`, not `GoldenPath`; already-canonical `mx-loop` passes through). AC3 verified: `grep` for concept-id prefix-strip logic outside `conceptSpineCanonicalization.mjs` returns only the now-documented dedupe function.
- `npm run test-unit -- â€¦/ingestion/AdrIngestor.spec.mjs â€¦/ingestion/ConceptDiscoveryService.spec.mjs` â†’ **24 passed**.

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] Re-run ingestion + the #14528 merge plan (re-runnable by design) to converge **historical** ADR `CODIFIES_CONCEPT` edges onto the canonical nodes â€” the #14502 post-merge probe (AC5, single-neighborhood resolution over Golden Path) measures exactly the axis this un-splits.

## Deltas
See "Deltas from ticket" above.
